# Repository assets

This directory is reserved for repository-owned brand assets (a project
logo or a GitHub social-preview image), added deliberately by a
maintainer rather than generated automatically.

No logo or preview image exists yet. The README's hero section
intentionally omits an image until one is added here — per the project's
documentation guidelines, no logo should be invented or hotlinked from a
third party.

When an asset is added:

- Logo: prefer an SVG plus a PNG fallback, referenced from the README
  hero with a relative path (e.g. `.github/assets/logo.png`).
- Social preview: a 1280×640px PNG, set via **Settings → Social preview**
  in the GitHub repository settings (a manual, maintainer-only action —
  see [docs/launch-checklist.md](../../docs/launch-checklist.md)).
